messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.





Now I'll analyze the document from the provided URL. The PDF is a chart note/lab report. Based on the report-analyzer skill instructions and the BloomCell framework, I'll process the document at:
`https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-85841970598211770002%20TD%20chartnote_Redacted.pdf`

This is a redacted chart note document. Applying the BloomCell 4-step analysis framework to generate the 8 structured JSON objects:



The skill has produced 8 objects. Now building merged records for each. Current UTC datetime: `2026-06-20T07:25:14.000Z`.



Storing record 1 of 8 — Internal Notes highlight:✅ Record 1 saved. Now storing record 2 of 8 — Internal Notes note:✅ Record 2 saved. Now storing record 3 of 8 — Understanding Your Results highlight:✅ Record 3 saved. Now storing record 4 of 8 — Understanding Your Results note:✅ Record 4 saved. Now storing record 5 of 8 — Priority Actions highlight:✅ Record 5 saved. Now storing record 6 of 8 — Priority Actions note:✅ Record 6 saved. Now storing record 7 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy highlight:✅ Record 7 saved. Now storing record 8 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy note:8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to Step 6 — updating the original PatientDocument record.

Document updated successfully.
